DP_PirateBay.questDescriptionRules.rules.li: questDescription-> Among the planet's numerous raider clans, the pirate Beerbeard and his floatilla have made a name for themselves for their piracy of the waters of the planet. Though Beerbeard's ships spend most of their time out at sea, we have discovered a potential land home base for his ships. If we were to raid their ships while they are still in harbor, we may be able to pirate their piracy for ourselves.
